file: 1141_Chen 等 - 2016 - Catalytic hydroprocessing of fatty acid methyl esters to renewable alkane fuels over NiHZSM-5 catal.txt

experiments.description: 在高压固定床反应器中，使用不同Ni负载量和Si/Al比的Ni/HZSM-5催化剂，对长链不饱和脂肪酸甲酯（FAMEs）进行催化加氢处理，以生产可再生烷烃燃料（C5-C18）。研究了温度、压力、H2/油摩尔比和液时空速（LHSV）等反应条件对转化率和选择性的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: their catalytic performance was investigated for the hydroprocessing of long-chain unsaturated fatty acid methyl esters (FAMEs) to renewable alkane fuels using a high-pressure fixed bed reactor system... The different Ni loading and Si/Al ratios of the catalysts, as well as the influence of reaction conditions such as temperature, pressure, H2/oil molar ratio, and liquid hourly space velocity (LHSV), were studied in detail.

Feedstock.value: Long-chain unsaturated fatty acid methyl esters (FAMEs)
Feedstock.original: Long-chain unsaturated fatty acid methyl esters (FAMEs)

Catalyst composition.original: Ni/HZSM-5 with different Ni loading (1-15 wt%) and Si/Al ratios (25, 50, 150, 360)

Catalyst stability.original: Conversion decreased to 30.1% after 80 h operation due to carbon deposition
